Container.Name: CrowdSec Map
Container.Overview: CrowdSec attack map dashboard with active bans, countries, IPs, scenarios, and timeline views.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: CrowdSec Map web interface port.

Config.Name: Data Source
Config.Description: auto, lapi-alerts, lapi-decisions, cscli, or sample.

Config.Name: Refresh Seconds
Config.Description: Default refresh interval in seconds. Users can change this in the UI.

Config.Name: CrowdSec Container
Config.Description: CrowdSec container name for cscli mode.

Config.Name: cscli Command
Config.Description: Command executed inside the CrowdSec container in cscli mode.

Config.Name: LAPI URL
Config.Description: CrowdSec Local API URL.

Config.Name: LAPI Login
Config.Description: Watcher machine login for lapi-alerts mode.

Config.Name: LAPI Password
Config.Description: Watcher machine password for lapi-alerts mode.

Config.Name: LAPI API Key
Config.Description: Bouncer API key for lapi-decisions mode.

Config.Name: Public Target IP
Config.Description: Optional target IP displayed in the dashboard header.

Config.Name: Auto Detect Public Target IP
Config.Description: Auto-detect the public target IP when Public Target IP is empty.

Config.Name: Public IP Refresh Minutes
Config.Description: Public IP auto-detect refresh interval in minutes.

Config.Name: History File
Config.Description: Persistent JSONL file used by the History view.

Config.Name: History Retention Days
Config.Description: Number of days kept in the local History view.

Config.Name: CrowdSec CTI API Key
Config.Description: Optional CrowdSec CTI API key for on-demand IP reputation checks.

Config.Name: CTI Cache File
Config.Description: Persistent CrowdSec CTI reputation cache file.

Config.Name: CTI Cache Hours
Config.Description: CrowdSec CTI cache duration in hours.

Config.Name: Trust Proxy Headers
Config.Description: Trust reverse proxy headers such as X-Forwarded-For.

Config.Name: Access Log Enabled
Config.Description: Optional demo visit logging. Logs HTML page visits, not API calls or assets.

Config.Name: Access Log File
Config.Description: Persistent demo visit log file.

Config.Name: Access Log Retention Days
Config.Description: Demo visit log retention in days.

Config.Name: Appdata
Config.Description: Persistent CrowdSec Map data directory for History.

Config.Name: Docker Socket
Config.Description: Optional. Required for cscli mode and active bans via CrowdSec container.
